text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, you don't seem very cheery<n>today. Is
something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: N-no. You're mistaken. I am completely<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so sure... I could've sworn you<n>were eating
less than normal today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Urk... The truth is, I had a dream last<n>night about
my grandparents. And now I<n>cannot stop thinking
of my family...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How shameful! Becoming sentimental is<n>the surest
sign of a weak mind! I must<n>train more diligently!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to be ashamed of. I think<n>about
my home a lot.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's right about that. It's natural to<n>want to
see your beloved family again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're here for you if you ever want to<n>talk about
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm very grateful to both of you.<n>Speaking about
it has brought some<n>peace to my mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Good. Then you should be ready for a<n>proper
meal. Luckily for us, the<n>restaurant in front of the
station is<n>offering free upgrades to extra large<n>
right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't hesitate to let us know if anything<n>else ever
troubles you. Just think of me<n>as your mama.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That... would perhaps be a little<n>strange... Hehe,
but I feel fortunate<n>nonetheless.
